data.title: Bitwise Expands Crypto ETP Offerings on London Stock Exchange
data.description: According to PANews, Bitwise, a crypto asset management firm, has listed four crypto exchange-traded products (ETPs) on the London Stock Exchange. These include a Bitcoin Core ETP, a Physical Bitcoin ETP, a Physical Ethereum ETP, and an Ethereum Staking ETP, targeting professional investors in the UK. Previously launched in Germany, these products aim to expand Bitwise's presence in the European market through the LSE. The Bitcoin Core ETP features an annual management fee of just 0.20%, while the Ethereum Staking product offers daily accumulated staking rewards, catering to institutional investors' diverse allocation needs.

EDT. The […]

data.title: Bitwise Lists Four Crypto ETPs on London Stock Exchange
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto asset management company Bitwise has listed four crypto exchange-traded products (ETPs) on the London Stock Exchange, including Bitcoin Core ETP, Physical Bitcoin ETP, Physical Ethereum ETP and Ethereum Staking ETP, targeting professional investors in the UK. This series of products has been issued in Germany before, and now it is expanding into the European market with the help of LSE.

data.title: Coinbase: Bitcoin may rebound in Q3, and its ability to resist macro market headwinds is increasing
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Coinbase pointed out in its monthly market assessment report that compared with traditional financial markets, Bitcoin's ability to resist macroeconomic headwinds is increasing, and the decline is relatively small. Although cryptocurrencies are in a bear market, they may rebound in the third quarter. However, Coinbase researchers said that the cyclical outlook in the digital asset field remains difficult and recommend continued caution in the next four to six weeks. As Bitcoin's role as a store of value continues to increase, a comprehensive assessment of the overall market activity of cryptocurrencies is needed to better define the bull and bear markets of this asset class. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Planet Evening News
Crypto in a bear market, rebound likely in Q3 — Coinbase
data.description:
A monthly market review by publicly traded US-based crypto exchange Coinbase shows that while the crypto market has contracted, it appears to be gearing up for a better quarter. According to Coinbase’s April 15 monthly outlook for institutional investors, the altcoin market cap shrank by 41% from its December 2024 highs of $1. 6 trillion to $950 billion by mid-April. BTC Tools data shows that this metric touched a low of $906
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-vc-funding-down-50-crypto-market-cap-40-possible-q3-upside-coinbase?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: UK Parliament Leader's Social Media Account Compromised to Promote Fake Cryptocurrency
data.description: According to Foresight News, Decrypt reported that the social media account of Lucy Powell, the leader of the UK House of Commons, was hacked on Tuesday. The compromised account was used to promote a fraudulent cryptocurrency called 'House of Commons Coin (HCC).' After Powell's office confirmed the breach and secured the account, posts featuring the official House of Commons emblem were swiftly removed.

data.title: Gate.io has launched AQA spot trading and started Launchpool staking mining
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io has launched AQA spot trading at 19:00 (UTC+8) on April 16, and opened AQA staking mining from 19:00 on April 16 to 19:00 on April 23 (UTC+8). Staking USDT and AQA to participate in Launchpool can share 5,000,000 AQA for free. Among them, the AQA mining pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 260.71%, and the USDT new user pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 104.29%.

data.title: KiloEX Suspends Platform, Tracks $7.5M Exploit Funds
data.description:
The KiloEX team announced the shutdown as they scrambled to track down the stolen funds, leaving users and investors on edge. This KiloEX incident reminds us that in the Wild West of Web3, even promising platforms can get caught with their pants down. KiloEX Rallies Partners to Track Hack and Recover Funds The KiloEX team […] The post KiloEX Suspends Platform, Tracks $7
